description: Local supplemental diagnosis data added on top of the base gretelai/symptom_to_diagnosis dataset.
grounding_notes: Examples are hand-authored paraphrases grounded in official rabies symptom descriptions.

Key symptom patterns emphasized: bite-site tingling or pain, fever, anxiety or confusion, hydrophobia, difficulty swallowing, excess saliva, hallucinations, and progressive weakness or paralysis after animal exposure.
